question: What minimal operator could register sibling asymmetry through phase drift alone while preserving the sustaining gap as pure non-reciprocal deferral?

responses_summary.grok:
The minimal such operator is the directed one-way delay \(D_\tau^+\) acting on phase alone:  
\[(D_\tau^+ \psi)(t) = e^{i\int_0^t \delta(s)\,ds}\psi(t-\tau),\quad \delta>0\]  
applied asymmetrically (
